# Scaffold (Codex Adapter)

Use this adapter to run Squid's scaffold workflow in Codex.

1. Read `../../references/codex-adapter.md`.
2. Read the packaged canonical contract at `../../references/canonical/skills/scaffold/SKILL.md`.
3. Follow the canonical workflow after applying the adapter translation rules.
4. Generate `AGENTS.md` as the canonical project brief. Generate a one-line `CLAUDE.md` pointer only because scaffolded projects are intended to work with both Claude Code and Codex.
